calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, August 06, 2015 in Department 525:

Hurleen Sidhu, Esq. (707) 365-5614, specially appearance counsel for Appellant/Defendant Ani Chopourian who is also present. .
Marc Libarle, Esq. (415) 928-2400, specially appearance counsel for Respondent/Defendant Gerald Loquet who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Counsel Sidhu testifies on behalf of Ani Chopourian, Appellant/Defendant and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - (1" white binder) lease, invoice, e-mails, photos, Dec. 16 second invoice,1/29/2015 letter, and request for refund, Dec.18th e-mail to Mr. Hansen.

Defendant/Respondent, Gerald Loquet testifies on his own behalf assisting by his counsel Liarle and responds to the questions from the Court.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - 11 pages contract, 5 pages schedule of work, invoice, and e-mail.

Counsel Libarle cross-examines appellant/defendant Ani Chopourian.
Counsel Libarle examines respondent Mr. Loquet.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. New evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-02-2015 Continued To Aug-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances : Ani Chopourian, Plaintiff
Gerald Loquet, Defendant. Marc Libarle,Esq. 415-928-2400

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn
The parties sign the stipulation for for hearing before Pro Tem Conmmissioner.

Per request of Plaintiff, the matter is continued to August 6, 2015 at 9:00am in Department 525. There shall be No further continuances. (CRC 8.960)

JPT; E. Myles; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported
